title: acinos arvensis var. perennans
intro: Acinos arvensis var. perennans, also known as thyme-leaved orphan, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Acinos arvensis var. perennans include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
